calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth was taken off calendar without prejudice to re-set.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Continued To Feb-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Continued To Jan-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Luis Villalobos (Petitioner). John French (Friend).

The Court denied Mr. Villalobos's request to have Mr. French speak for him. Furthermore, the Court stated that Mr. French is not an attorney and only an attorney can speak for him. Mr. Villalobos requested for a continuance and the Court continued the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth to January 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Continued To Jan-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it has questions regarding the documentation that has been submitted. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth was continued to January 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Probate Examiner will send notes or contact the Petitioner.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Jones. (Not Reported)
